text_block_list.name: Announcer
text_block_list.text:
With half the players eliminated, the battle is reaching its climax! Still
in the game are Mejiro McQueen, Gold Ship—

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
There we go! ...As well as Maruzensky and Sakura Chiyono O. Who
will be the best of all? Will it be Gold Ship like we're all thinking?!

text_block_list.name: Announcer
text_block_list.text: H-hey, you can't do that! You're talking over my mic!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Word? So the whole island can hear me? Heeey! Can you guys hear
meee?!

text_block_list.name: Island-Wide Announcement
text_block_list.text:
I'm tired of picking seaweed, so I'm about to start looking for you!
Think I'll swim up the river with the salmon!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
If I can hear you over the loudspeakers, it means you're at the main
stage. You're a fearless one. Let's see how you react when I come to
take you—

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Uh, ahem! How improper for her to shout like that. Think of all the
trouble she's causing for the announcer.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
(I won't behave in that manner and lose control of myself. I must win
with grace for the Mejiro name.)

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
It looks like someone walked through this grass... Hm? Ah hah, I knew
it. ♪

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Hehe, I know you're there. Come on out, Chiyo.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: There's no fooling you, Maruzen. But how did you know it was me?

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
By your footprints. ♪ Golshi has longer legs and McQueen's stride is
different.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Only relentless training could make a perfectly even stride like yours.
I know your running very well, Chiyo.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
You really have noticed a lot about me. You're... just as amazing as I
thought... That's why!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: That's why I have to defeat you! Maruzen... get readyyy!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
(She's fast! And she's reading my movements when she makes her
shots!)

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: I guess... I can't take things easy-peasy anymore! Hyah!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Ah! Wagh! That won't hit me! I practiced dodging with Yaeno!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Now it's my turn! Haaah!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Kyah! That was close! Huff... Gasp... Ngh!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: (I'm cornered? I don't see any way out!)

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
You won't even let a second of this be boring, huh? Good, let me
show you something now... Hraaah!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Wha?! She completely revved up... and is charging right at me!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: (I won't stop! I'm going to win! Hold on till the last second and... now!)

text_block_list.name: Chiyono O & Maruzen
text_block_list.text: Haaaaah!

text_block_list.name: Island-Wide Announcement
text_block_list.text:
And the winner is... Sakura Chiyono O! A single, impeccably aimed
shot—what a hit!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
I was empty? Aww, I thought I got you too. Hehe, too bad for me...
Hahaha!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Gasp... Wheeze... I-I... I won? Yes, I did it!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
You crushed me. I never knew it could be this fun—ah! Chiyo, behind
you!
Hiyah!

text_block_list.name: Announcer
text_block_list.text:
Sakura Chiyono O is making a run for it! She's been pulled into
another tough fight! Whoa! Gold Ship's onslaught finally defeated
her!

text_block_list.name: Announcer
text_block_list.text:
Now, only Gold Ship and Mejiro McQueen are left! Over to our guest
commentator. What do you make of this, Nakayama?

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text: Commentator? Come on, I was only giving my opinion to kill time.

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
Fine... It's a fair outcome or whatever. Both Golshi and McQueen
have pretty exceptional physical talent.

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
McQueen is solid in terms of sheer ability. She can handle a battle of
wits and a drawn-out fight. But...

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text: You never know what kind of craziness Golshi is going to pull. Her strength is terrifyingly unpredictable.

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
That's what will determine the winner. Whoever gets overwhelmed or
misjudges a critical moment first... is done!

text_block_list.name: Announcer
text_block_list.text:
I see! Gold Ship's state of mind will certainly be something to watch.
It will be interesting to see how Mejiro McQueen approaches this!

text_block_list.name: island-Wide Announcement
text_block_list.text:
The victor of this year's contest is about to be decided. Which of the
two players will come out on top?!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Well, you really managed to stay in the game until the end. I would
have been quite disappointed otherwise!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: But I'm going to claim victory today! I will not fail! Prepare to keep your promise and start behaving yourself!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Oops! That wasn't right. I mustn't let my personal grievances get the
better of me.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
(There are other students watching. I have to do things the proper
way. The bet is simply a personal matter. I can't get emotional.)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
I should wait for her on the main stage. It will make for a more
entertaining event.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
I am a member of the Mejiro family. So I'll just have to win this battle
in respectful silence.
